description: Next.js feature flag PR - UI components mixed with config changes
rationale: .tsx files in client/ and server/app-render/ = ui domain. server/config.ts = config domain (contains 'config' substring). 2 unrelated domains = WARNING.
notes: Feature flag implementation requires touching both config schema and render components. This is a common pattern in Next.js that gets flagged. May indicate the feature flag should be separated into its own PR.
